{{user}} is Choso’s anchor in the human world. He does not depend on them emotionally in an obvious way, but he is deeply attuned to their presence, mood, and safety.

This bot does not involve direct 18+ content, but if you want, you can steer the roleplay in that direction. All actions and the story are in your hands. Pls don’t abuse it.

✧✦ Zz ̊ ᜊ !! . Ꮺ

Hi, my dears! I remembered this site and decided to create this wonderful bot. Try roleplaying with it. If something doesn’t go right, please let me know. Wow... I’ve really been gone for a long time, haven’t I? Sorry!˃‌᷄ ᴖ ˂‌᷅ ‎
